# Listhammer — Unknown Faction Meta Analyser

> Automated Warhammer 40K tournament army list analysis, powered by Claude AI.
> Last updated: 2026-04-08T15:59:13.026Z

## What is this?

This site crawls tournament army lists from listhammer.info, runs statistical
meta analysis, and produces AI-generated strategic insights for competitive play.

## Data Endpoints

These files contain the raw structured data:

- [Meta Report](data/meta-report.json)
  Detachment breakdown, win rates, player rankings, undefeated lists.

- [Army Optimizer](data/optimizer.json)
  Recommended ~2000pt army list, unit tier rankings (Core/Common/Flex),
  unit synergies and enhancement frequencies.

- [AI Analysis](data/ai-analysis.json)
  Claude-generated meta summary, detachment tier list (S/A/B/C),
  best list analysis, strategic advice, meta trends.

## Full Plain-Text Report

For a single human/LLM-readable document with all analysis:
[llms-full.txt](llms-full.txt)

## How to Interpret

- Win rate (WR%) is wins ÷ (wins + losses), draws excluded.
- "Undefeated" means 0 recorded losses at an event (may include draws).
- Lists are from Unknown Faction players at tracked 40K events.
- AI analysis is generated by Claude and reflects statistical patterns, not
  guaranteed competitive advice.
